GOBD Delivery

IFR Clearance Rules

Cruise Level Rules

RVSM (feet)
EVEN IFR ODD
180º to 359º IFR 360º to 179º
020, 040, 060, 080, 100 010, 030, 050, 070, 090
120, 140, 160, 180, 200 110, 130, 150, 170, 190
220, 240, 260, 280, 300 210, 230, 250, 270, 290
320, 340, 360, 380, 400 310, 330, 350, 370, 390
430, 470, 510, 550, 590 410, 450, 490, 430, 570
180º to 359º VFR 360º to 179º
045, 065, 085, 105 035, 055, 075, 095
125, 145 115, 135
  • The VFR flights are not allowed over and above the flight level 150 (DOC 7030 ICAO).
